question: Is the image rendered in a realistic photography style with soft daylight?
Is there a wet metal seedling bench in the foreground showing water droplets and mud spots?
Are there exactly 9 black seedling trays on the bench?
Does the front-left seedling tray have its upper-left cell missing, exposing the bottom grid?
Are there green pruning shears (with rust spots) and a wooden-handled small trowel at the left front corner?
Is the trowel crossed over the pruning shears, pressing on top of at least half of the shears' handle?
Is there a transparent spray bottle with a white nozzle at the right front corner?
Are there exactly 6 white plant label stakes beside the spray bottle?
Do the plant labels correctly display the words "Tomato", "Mint", "Basil", "Pepper", "Rosemary", and "Strawberry"?
Is the bottom half of the plant labels obscured by a black drip irrigation tube?
Are there exactly 6 light brown wicker hanging baskets on the left side of the midground?
Do the leaves from the 3rd hanging basket drape down to cover the edge of the 4th basket?
Is Gardener A wearing a straw hat and a blue apron?
Is Gardener A bending over and watering the trays with water forming thin streams?
Is Gardener B wearing yellow rain boots with visible mud spots?
Is Gardener B holding a clipboard titled "Greenhouse Records"?
Does the clipboard held by Gardener B cover their waist area?
Is a black garden cart positioned between the two gardeners?
Are there exactly 3 bags of peat soil on the cart with the text "PEAT" visible?
Are there exactly 2 rolls of garden ties on the cart, one red and one green?
Is there a glass wall in the background showing condensation and reflections?
Does the wall corner thermometer display "28°C"?
Is there a white rotating ceiling fan showing slight motion blur?
Does the sign on the door read "Greenhouse 3"?
Is the image free from severe artifacts (e.g., floating objects, incoherent geometry)?
